title: Avatar
description: The Avatar component displays a user's profile image or initials, typically used for user identification. It supports multiple content types including text, icons, images, and badges.

sections.title: Defaults
sections.description: Shows default inputs (color='default', look='solid', shape='rounded', size=48) and the built-in SVG fallback when no content is projected.

sections.title: Size
sections.description: You can customize the size of the avatar in pixels.

sections.title: Look
sections.description: Different visual styles for the avatar appearance.

sections.title: Shape
sections.description: Different visual styles for the avatar's corners.

sections.title: Content
sections.description: Text, icon, and image projection using ax-text, ax-icon, and ax-image slots.

sections.title: Text Mode
sections.description: You can set text as an avatar.

sections.title: Icon Mode
sections.description: You can set an icon as an avatar.

sections.title: Image Mode
sections.description: You can display a photo as an avatar.

sections.title: Group
sections.description: Group multiple avatars together with overlapping display.

sections.title: Badge / Status
sections.description: Project an ax-badge into the avatar to indicate status (e.g., online/offline).

sections.title: Events
sections.description: Demonstrates colorChange, sizeChange and onOptionChanged when changing inputs at runtime.

props.name: color
props.description: The color theme of the avatar. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

props.name: size
props.description: Defines the size of the avatar in pixels.

props.name: shape
props.description: The visual style of the avatar's corners.

props.name: look
props.description: The visual style of the avatar appearance.

events.name: colorChange
events.description: Emitted when the color changes. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

events.name: sizeChange
events.description: Emitted when the size value changes.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Emitted when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void
